metadata.description: yukineko's Claude Code tools. Hosts the harness family: ctxrot (context-rot guard) and playbook (project-knowledge retriever), both subscription-native.

plugins.name: ctxrot
plugins.description: Context-rot guard: 5 hooks (guard/rescue/restore/preguard/toolguard) + /distill skill + ctxrot-distiller subagent, with a bundled Rust binary. Runs on your Claude subscription; no API key.

plugins.name: playbook
plugins.description: Knowledge retrieval: a UserPromptSubmit hook that scores curated notes against your prompt and injects the relevant ones under a char budget, with a bundled Rust binary. Runs on your Claude subscription; no API key.
